hooks.description: Verify all changes are committed before compaction
Non-blocking quality reminders after tool use

description: Hook configuration for agentic-workflows hub. Hooks fire on tool events to enforce quality, safety, and state management.
notes: The quality gate runs as a pre-commit check via checkpoint-commit.sh (wired into the script directly).
These hooks provide additional event-based enforcement for non-commit events (compaction, tool use).
Hooks are implemented as bash scripts in scripts/hooks/ for simplicity and cross-platform compatibility.
